ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dot_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DoT service provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the DoT service provider */,
  "ip_addresses" TEXT /* IP addresses of the DoT service provider */,
  "tls_ports" INTEGER /* TLS ports used by the DoT service provider */,
  "hostname_for_tls_authentication" TEXT /* Hostname used for TLS authentication */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the service provider */,
  "privacy_policy_url" TEXT /* URL to the privacy policy of the service provider */,
  "logging_policy" TEXT /* Brief description of the logging policy */,
  "filtering_policy" TEXT /* Brief description of the filtering policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service provider was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service provider's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider detail */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DoT service provider */,
  "spki_pin" TEXT /* Base 64 encoded form of SPKI pin(s) for TLS authentication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the DoT service provider */,
  "dns_over_https" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether DNS-over-HTTPS is supported */,
  "supported_protocols" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of supported DNS protocols */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the geographical coverage of the service provider */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metrics */,
  "security_features" TEXT /* Brief description of additional security features */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_details_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES dot_providers ("provider_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each DoT service provider
Name of the DoT service provider
IP addresses of the DoT service provider
TLS ports used by the DoT service provider
Hostname used for TLS authentication
Official website of the service provider

Brief description of the filtering policy
Timestamp when the service provider was added to the platform
Timestamp when the service provider's details were last updated
